changelog:
THE AEGIS PROTOCOL (v6.1):
- [SECURITY] True Rate Limiting: Embedded IP-based rate limiting in Lighthouse API to prevent SQLite database locks and DDoS.
- [SYSTEM] The Kill Signal: Opting out of the Lighthouse now instantly vaporizes your node from the global directory in real-time.
- [DOCS] WAF Defense Guide: Added official SECURITY.md for deploying Cloudflare WAF shields without blocking P2P organic traffic.
